title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker19: coap_config.c
close_reason: Resolved merge conflict in coap_config.c by integrating improved frequency validation (tighter bounds + overflow check), BW limit, sync_word hex parser safety (len<=6 to prevent shift UB), updated comment, and safe base64 check in fingerprint computation. Matches best practices from worker2. Staged fix in main merge.
